name: @kolm/tsac-worker
description: W721 — Task-Specific Attention Compiler (TSAC) kernel-selector stub. Reads a per-(layer,head) sparsity profile and emits a kernel-name selection table for serve-time dispatch. Heavy ML kernel deps (CUDA/Metal/CPU kernels) are a FUTURE WAVE; this worker ships the contract that real kernel dispatchers will plug into. Root kolm install pulls ZERO TSAC deps.

python.note: Default kernel selector is workers/tsac/scripts/tsac.py (stdlib only — argparse + json). Override with $TSAC_KERNEL_CMD when integrating a real GPU kernel selector. The runtime kernel dispatch (CUDA/Metal/CPU sparse-attention kernels) is a future wave.
